slides.title:
Access your trend cockpit easily !
Trend spotting, simplified.
slides.description: Simplify your business with AI. Manage timelines, track performance, and gain real-time insights—all in one place. Log in now.

slides.title:
Real-time analytics at your fingertips
Data-driven decisions, made simple.
slides.description: Transform raw data into actionable insights. Monitor KPIs, track trends, and optimize performance with our intelligent dashboard.

slides.title:
Powerful insights for growth
Scale your business with confidence.
slides.description: Leverage advanced analytics to identify opportunities, predict trends, and make informed decisions that drive sustainable growth.

slides.title:
Collaborate and succeed together
Team Trend Agent, unified vision.
slides.description: Share insights across teams, create custom reports, and align everyone with real-time data visualization and collaborative tools.

Chat.timelinesDesc: Visualise how your data changes over time. Track key moments, spot performance patterns, and understand the story behind your progress.
Chat.topicFeelingDesc: Analyse emotions and tone behind your data. Instantly see whether feedback, reviews, or conversations lean positive, negative, or neutral.
Chat.trendSummaryDesc: Identify what's gaining traction. Get AI-powered insights on emerging patterns, helping you make smarter, data-driven decisions.
